settings.title: Get the Help You Need
settings.description: If you have any questions about our products, payments, delivery, or returns, please feel free to contact us.

settings.title: We promise to respond to your message or call within 24 hours. Whenever you reach out to us, we are committed to providing prompt and dedicated assistance.

settings.question: WHAT DOES YOUR WARRANTY COVER?
settings.answer: Every AutoFull product is designed and tested for industry-leading safety and durability. That's why we stand behind all our chairs and desks with up to a 3 year extended warranty. Aesthetic defects and damage due to misuse of product are not covered. To make a warranty claim, submit your claim via our Contact page, along with image or video evidence of the affected area. AutoFull reserves the final right to determine if a benefit under the warranty can be claimed.

settings.question: CAN I CANCEL MY ORDER?
settings.answer: Due to the relatively short turnaround time between processing and courier pick-up, your order may already be on its way to you. We will try our best to cancel your order but in the event we are unable to cancel it in time and your order gets delivered, reach out to our Support team via our Contact page to initiate a return. For a smooth return process, do not open the packaging.

settings.question: WHERE DOES AUTOFULL SHIP TO?
settings.answer: We ship to residential or commercial addresses in the United States, but are unable to deliver to PO boxes.

settings.question: HOW LONG WILL IT TAKE TO GET MY ORDERS?
settings.answer: It depends on where you are. Orders processed here will take 1 business day to arrive. Deliveries can take anywhere from 3-7 days. Delivery details will be provided in your confirmation email.

settings.question: HOW DO I TRACK MY ORDER?
settings.answer: Once your order ships, you'll receive a shipping confirmation email and tracking number, so you can follow your package as it makes its way to you. However tracking information can take up to 24 hours to update, so don't worry if it doesn't show up immediately. We recommend tracking your order and ensuring that you're home on the day of delivery to receive your order.
